# React · Vite · TanStack Starter

> A modern, type-safe React starter template built for the AI-coding era:
> Vite, TanStack Router & Query, TailwindCSS v4, and shadcn/ui on Base UI
> primitives — with agent-native conventions and pre-commit guardrails.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org) convention: a concise map
for AI agents. Full conventions are in AGENTS.md.

## Stack

- React 19 + TypeScript (strict)
- Vite (build/dev)
- TanStack Router (file-based routing, `src/routes/`)
- TanStack Query (server state)
- TailwindCSS v4 + shadcn/ui on Base UI primitives
- Vitest + Testing Library (jsdom)

## Conventions

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): canonical conventions, commands, structure, checklist
- Use `bun`/`bunx`, never `npm`/`npx`
- Run `bun run verify` (lint + typecheck + format + test + build) before "done"
- `src/routeTree.gen.ts` is generated — never edit by hand

## Entry points

- `src/main.tsx`: app entry
- `src/routes/__root.tsx`: root layout
- `src/index.css`: Tailwind + design tokens

## Optional

- [README.md](./README.md): human-facing setup and feature docs
- [docs/design-system.md](./docs/design-system.md): styling and design tokens
